description_long: This pastry shop is a charming, two-story building with a steeply pitched, shingled roof partially covered in patches of snow, evoking a wintry, old-world atmosphere. The facade features a mix of red brickwork on the lower half and cream-colored plaster on the upper half, with green shuttered windows and a prominent bay window on the ground floor. A sign above the entrance reads 'Scrooge & Marley' in black lettering on a white background, suggesting a Dickensian or Victorian theme. The shop has a single front door, flanked by windows, and a tall, red brick chimney rising from the roof. The architectural details, such as the wooden trim, window shutters, and snow accents, add to the quaint, historical feel. No pastries or interior details are visible from the exterior, and the building appears solid and decorative.
description: A quaint, snow-dusted pastry shop with a brick and plaster facade, green shuttered windows, and a 'Scrooge & Marley' sign above the entrance. The building features a steep shingled roof, bay window, and a tall chimney, evoking a Victorian charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, two shuttered windows, and the 'Scrooge & Marley' sign above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall chimney, a single shuttered window, and the snow-covered roof slope.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, two windows (one round, one rectangular), and a back door, with less decorative detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chimney, a single shuttered window, and the brick and plaster wall.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular white sign with black uppercase text reading 'SCROOGE & MARLEY' is centered above the main entrance. The sign is bordered by a wooden trim and is visually prominent, matching the historical theme of the building. No logos or additional decorative elements are present on the signage.
attribute_architectural_style: Victorian-inspired, with a steeply pitched shingled roof, red brick and cream plaster facade, green shuttered windows, bay window, and decorative wooden trim.
